title: Rewrite app/api/notifications/cleanup/route.ts to call service directly
completion_summary: Replaced Python worker proxy with native notification-engine service call in cleanup route
acceptance_criteria: Route no longer imports getBackendConfig or getCircuitBreakerStatus
Route no longer fetches to PYTHON_WORKER_URL
Route imports and calls cleanupExpiredNotifications from notification-engine service
Deletes notifications older than configurable TTL (default 30 days)
Preserves unread notifications or marks them before deletion
Returns count of cleaned up notifications
